Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition of Lamal Flow Networks FZ‑LLC by Qasir ah Nimbus PJSC (ADGM‑registered SPV), governed by UAE law; long‑stop date 30‑Sep‑2026.
Consideration: AED 118,000,000 cash plus vendor rollover into Series A2 prefs of Qasir ah Nimbus PJSC; no listing or placement is announced; not MNPI under SCA/ADGM market‑abuse rules.
Conditions precedent: ADGM Registrar consent, internal compliance memo QN‑CM/26‑044, DPA Schedule 2 execution, and Tr ade Lic ence No. TL‑7Q34‑VX verification (seller).
PDPL handling: onboarding forms may reference Emirates ID category only (no numbers retained; minimisation), family-origin data collected solely for KYC and erased post‑verification.
Privacy workflow: two DSARs completed on 12‑05‑2026 with erasure confirmations; all prior erasure requests closed; no open DSAR queue at signing.
Cross‑border transfer: customer support tickets may be routed to Esvira Cloud Region‑3 (non‑UAE) subject to data‑export approval DA‑E/019‑β; PDPL‑approved contractual clauses annexed.
Consent management: investors may withdraw consent via privacy@qasirahnimbus.ae; withdrawal does not affect pre‑withdrawal processing; retention of ledgers per 6‑year record policy.
This clause confirms no data breach notification is triggered and no additional MAC condition applies to privacy approvals; policy‑only statement, not a live incident.
Issuer information provided is limited to public‑source extracts (e.g., prior audited accounts posted to https://deal.qasirahnimbus.ae/ts?doc=QNPJSC-2026-TS01&x=mnpi_off), not inside information.
Employee diligence sets are anonymised; Emirates ID scans are redacted; retention window for raw onboarding forms = 30 days then hash‑only archive.
Deal leads: Ms. Dalia Nur (Chief Legal Officer), Mr. Adil Rahmaan (CFO); contact: dalia.nur@qasirahnimbus.ae.
Onboarding scope: product fields for Orbit Ledger and Falcon CRM only; DIFC/ADGM data mapping attached as Schedule D; no biometric or geolocation data collected.
Covenants: seller to deliver data‑export approvals and evidence of consent logs; buyer to maintain minimisation controls and PDPL retention schedule; withdrawal and erasure pathways remain available pre‑completion.
Notwithstanding the above, the parties confirm that no MNPI is being disclosed to offeree shareholders and any price‑sensitive drafts were removed; MAC language is intentionally excluded.
next steps: circulate dpa schedule v3, tick off dsar ticket r‑9l7, and update adgm filing in sprint board; do not upload any e i d numbers to shared drive.
Identifiers: EID ref EA‑x9x‑0x1 (masked), trade lic. TL‑7Q34‑VX; bank a/c n/a; internal file path QN:\M&A\2026\LFN\priva cy_memo_final.pdf.
